name: Gold Tone Triple Heart Charm Bracelet
description: Add a delicate, romantic touch to your jewelry collection with this gold-tone heart charm bracelet. Featuring three polished, puffed heart motifs spaced evenly along a fine chain. Includes an adjustable extender and is finished with an anti-tarnish coating for enduring shine.

media.alt_text: Gold tone delicate chain bracelet featuring three polished puffed heart charms

faqs.question: Is the size of this bracelet adjustable?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes a built-in extender chain with a secure lobster clasp, allowing you to easily adjust the fit to your wrist size.

faqs.question: Can I wear this everyday?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! It is crafted with a premium anti-tarnish finish, making it a beautiful and durable accessory for daily wear.

meta_title: Gold Tone Triple Heart Bracelet | Anti-Tarnish Jewelry
meta_description: Discover our delicate Gold Tone Triple Heart Charm Bracelet. Featuring polished puffed hearts, an adjustable chain, and a durable anti-tarnish finish.
